<!-- One sentence: what do you want? -->

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected? -->

<!-- How should it work? Include API design, CLI flags, config keys if relevant -->

<!-- What workarounds or alternatives have you tried? Why aren't they sufficient? -->
